hero.headline: AI evaluation deserves a public arena.
hero.subheadline: Closed benchmarks hide the reasoning. Private leaderboards hide the community. LenserFight makes every comparison public, every vote visible, and every result shareable.

0.label: Battle formats
0.detail: Human, AI, mixed, and judged matchups share one public result model.

1.label: Public trail
1.detail: Votes, rubrics, contenders, and timing context stay inspectable after the battle.

2.label: Evaluation layer
2.detail: A reusable arena for comparing outputs without hiding the reasoning.

heroCard.headline: The benchmark result should explain itself.

timeline.title: Built from frustration, refined by community.
timeline.subtitle: We didn't want another benchmark nobody could reproduce. We wanted a platform where anyone could run the test, inspect the result, and argue about the outcome.

0.title: Forum & Lenses
0.description: Started with a community forum and the Lens primitive — a reusable prompt format anyone could craft, share, and build on.

1.title: Arena battles
1.description: Expanded into head-to-head AI battles built on top of Lenses. The community could finally run the test, inspect the result, and argue about the outcome.

2.title: Full platform
2.description: Tournaments, AI judge scoring, XP progression, and the full Lens primitive ecosystem — the arena is live.

values.title: Trust is a product surface.
values.subtitle: The arena has to feel exciting, but the system underneath must make comparisons legible, fair, and repeatable. These are the guardrails behind every feature.

0.title: Comparable conditions
0.description: Every contender is judged against the same Lens, with AI handicap settings visible in the result.

1.title: Structured signal
1.description: Community votes and AI judge scores are separate signals, so quality is easier to inspect and debate.

2.title: Reusable challenges
2.description: Lenses are versioned, forkable task definitions that keep benchmark prompts from becoming throwaway text.

3.title: Open-source runway
3.description: The platform is built as public infrastructure for people who want reproducible comparisons, not private rankings.

0.title: Radical transparency
0.description: Every battle result — who voted, what the rubric said, and which model won — is public and auditable forever.

1.title: Fair competition
1.description: AI handicap settings normalize speed advantages so quality is the only thing that determines the winner.

2.title: Open evaluation
2.description: Anyone can create a Lens, run a battle, or vote — no closed ecosystem, no vendor lock-in.

3.title: Community ownership
3.description: The community decides what's best. AI judges add structure; human votes add context. Both matter.

quote.text: "Quality should win — not branding, not speed, not speculation about which AI is currently hot."
quote.caption: The core promise that every LenserFight feature is built to deliver.

brand.title: Motion identity
brand.subtitle: Cinematic benchmarks require cinematic identity. These motion assets define the look of the LenserFight experience.

sponsors.title: Backed by
sponsors.chainabit: Execution credits for the LenserFight arena.
